description.zh-Hans: 对输入图像应用卷积核。支持模糊、锐化、边缘检测。使用环绕采样以保持无缝平铺。
description.en: Applies a convolution kernel to the input image. Supports blur, sharpen, edge-detect. Uses wrapped sampling to maintain seamless tiling.

triggers.zh-Hans: 卷积, 方框模糊, 高斯模糊, 锐化, 边缘检测, 浮雕, 描边, 雕刻
triggers.en: convolution, box blur, gaussian blur, sharpen, edge detect, emboss, outline, engrave

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 使用边缘检测卷积核提取图像的轮廓。
exampleUsage.en: Extract the outlines of an image using an edge detection convolution kernel.
